projects.title: WordHawk
projects.description: A repurposed 3D printer that plays Word Hunt for you! Won Best Use of MemryX at MHacks 2025.

projects.title: wubwub
projects.description: An interactive music visualizer that uses hand gestures to control music playback and audio effects. Won grand prize at BigRed Hacks 2025.

projects.title: Pi-Pal
projects.description: A gesture-controlled hospital room system powered by an advanced computer vision model and demo-ed with a Raspberry Pi. Won grand prize at Hoya Hacks 2025.

projects.title: Osulation
projects.description: A program that uses computer vision to play Osu with hand gestures. Won Best Use of Roboflow at MHacks 17.

projects.title: Accel
projects.description: An empathetic tutor that uses AI to provide personalized feedback to students. Won Best Use of Intel at Berkeley AI Hackathon 2024.

projects.title: OneVote
projects.description: AI chatbot tool that allows users to ask questions about candidate information, recent news, and more. Won Social Impact at MHacks 16.

projects.title: Tunesphere
projects.description: Song recommendation system that utilizes sentiment analysis to introduce new genres to listeners. Won Best Design at HackTJ 10.0.
